text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I need to keep track of the other racers and save my strength for the
final leg of the race.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(This strategy will allow me to make use of my speed while also
ensuring a higher chance at victory. I'm certain that this is the correct
path for me... but...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ("You sound almost jealous there.")

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Why won't the words of Team Sirius's trainer leave my head?)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! The hell you waitin' for?! If you wanna be the best in Japan,
you better start runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (I thought I was facing my dreams head-on...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (But then... why does it feel like my view's grown foggy?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your win today! That's two in a row! Two!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, thank you, but... you've been congratulating me all day...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And I'll congratulate you a billion times more! You were just that
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Especially in the homestretch! You broke from the pack like peeeew! It must feel so good to leave everyone behind like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm still working on my pace and stuff, so I'm not sure how you do it.
I'll just have to practice more!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Suzuka? You seem pretty sad for someone who just won a race...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, no, I'm very happy I won.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But what about you, Special Week? Team Sirius seems like a very...
lively team.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, they're all super fun and kind! They're even helping me figure
out my own style.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Every once in a while, Gold Ship will force me to do some weird
training, but... overall, I'm super happy I joined their team!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...That's good.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, yep! This team'll take me all the way to being the best racer in
all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (She really is facing her dreams head-on.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, Suzuka, you're spacing out again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, sorry.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Something on your mind? You're not acting like someone who just
won twice in a row.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just... don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I won my last race, but the scenery in front of me felt off somehow...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you could use a break. Knowledge is power, but you can't use
that power if you're stressed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but the Derby is coming up next. I don't have time to
relax.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I have to keep winning...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you've got the pacing down for a 2,400-meter race! I
noticed you still have stamina to burn.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: You've got what it takes to dominate all the Classic races. Win and make your dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Spe! What's your dream again?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: To become... the best racer in Japaaan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Now show me what the best in Japan is made of! No pain,
no gain!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait a minute, why aren't you training?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(...I don't have time to get distracted. I have to make my dreams come
true!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her speed is the real deal! And she takes the Derby crown with a
runaway finish!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The fan favorite Silence Suzuka struggled today, coming in at ninth
place!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh!
